summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stock Transfers and Usage Log bug fixes (iteration 30+ handoff). All features are fully functional. Backend APIs working correctly with proper data (15 transfers, 200+ movements). Frontend pages are no longer 'Coming Soon' placeholders - both Stock Transfers and Usage Log are fully implemented with working KPIs, filters, and workflows. Regression tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: Login API (200 OK, token obtained)
Backend: GET /api/inventory/transfers (15 transfers found)
Backend: GET /api/inventory/transfers/{id} (detail retrieval working)
Backend: POST /api/inventory/transfers (draft creation working)
Backend: POST /api/inventory/transfers/{id}/send (draft->sent transition working)
Backend: POST /api/inventory/transfers/{id}/receive (sent->received transition working)
Backend: GET /api/inventory/movements (200 movements found, multiple types)
Backend: GET /api/inventory/balance (65 items, Rp 98.467.435 total value)
Frontend: Login flow working
Frontend: Outlet Home loads with petty cash KPI (Rp 28.645.130)
Frontend: Stock Transfers page is FUNCTIONAL (not 'Coming Soon')
Frontend: Stock Transfers KPIs showing real data (16 transfers, 5 in transit, Rp 7.067.512)
Frontend: Stock Transfers status filters working (Semua/Draft/Dikirim/Diterima)
Frontend: Stock Transfers detail dialog opens/closes correctly
Frontend: Stock Transfers create dialog opens/closes correctly
Frontend: Usage Log page is FUNCTIONAL (not 'Coming Soon')
Frontend: Usage Log KPIs showing real data (191 movements, Rp 26.092.042 usage, Rp 343.808 waste)
Frontend: Usage Log type filters working
Frontend: Usage Log search box working
Frontend: Stock Check page functional (regression test passed)
Frontend: Stock Check shows 65 items, Rp 98.467.435 total value, 0 items need restock
Frontend: HR Home shows Open Advances (regression test passed)
Frontend: Daily Sales page accessible

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all major features working, 1 minor timeout on HR Approvals navigation - not in scope)
